title: Unique Materials
description: Unique Materials adds plenty new resources and ingredients that make creative part of game more fun!
body:
Unique Materials adds several new resources and ingredients to the game:

- Halite Ore
- Rutile Ore that smelts to Titanium
- Bauxite Ore that smelts to Aluminium
- Olivine Ore that smelts to Silicon
- Silver Ore
- Black Diamond Ore
- Nether Citrine Ore
- Nether Aventurine Ore

Mod adds three new trees to the game:

- Mahogany tree
- Beech tree
- Sequoia tree

Mod is in early development phase so many items and textures are still missing, but we are getting there!
